mapper.select: SELECT vendCode AS account, vendName AS name, bankName AS bankInfo, bankNum AS bankAccount, cnaps AS cnapsCode , CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS state , ISNULL(v.vendSubClasses, '') + CASE WHEN ISNULL(v.vendSubClasses, '') = '' OR ISNULL(vi.vendorType, '') = '' THEN '' ELSE N'、' END + ISNULL(vi.vendorType, '') AS relateType , '{' + '"vendSubClasses":"' + ISNULL(v.vendSubClasses, '') + '",' + '"vendorType":"' + ISNULL(vi.vendorType, '') + '"' + '}' AS customInfo FROM DPtech_V_Vend v LEFT JOIN IWS_VendInfoUpdate vi ON v.vendCode = vi.accountNum AND vi.dataAreaId = 'D001' WHERE v.vendClasses = N'行政采购供应商'
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_property_af_from_sms (id, orderExecNumber, projectCode, projectName, marketCode, officeCode, expendId, marketName, officeName, systemName, salesManCode, systemId, industryId, salesManName, expendName, industryName, channelName, engineeFee, objId, applyType, corporationCode, finalCustomerName, pspm, pspmName, salesMenTel, decPath, requireInDate, receiveMen, reveiveContactWay, receiveAddress, projectType, projectMoney, afProjectMoney, submitTime, serviceTypeName, customerProjectName, agentName, lendCause, predBidDate, customInfo) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderExecNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expendId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.salesManCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.industryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.salesManName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expendName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.channelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.engineeFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.applyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.finalCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pspm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pspmName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.salesMenTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.decPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.requireInDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.receiveMen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reveiveContactWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.afProjectMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.submitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.serviceTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.agentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lendCause,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.predBidDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.customInfo,jdbcType=JSON})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = VALUES(id), orderExecNumber = VALUES(orderExecNumber), projectName = VALUES(projectName), marketCode = VALUES(marketCode), officeCode = VALUES(officeCode), expendId = VALUES(expendId), marketName = VALUES(marketName), officeName = VALUES(officeName), systemName = VALUES(systemName), salesManCode = VALUES(salesManCode), systemId = VALUES(systemId), industryId = VALUES(industryId), salesManName = VALUES(salesManName), expendName = VALUES(expendName), industryName = VALUES(industryName), channelName = VALUES(channelName), engineeFee = VALUES(engineeFee), objId = VALUES(objId), applyType = VALUES(applyType), corporationCode = VALUES(corporationCode), finalCustomerName = VALUES(finalCustomerName), pspm = VALUES(pspm), pspmName = VALUES(pspmName), salesMenTel = VALUES(salesMenTel), decPath = VALUES(decPath), requireInDate = VALUES(requireInDate), receiveMen = VALUES(receiveMen), reveiveContactWay = VALUES(reveiveContactWay), receiveAddress = VALUES(receiveAddress), projectType = VALUES(projectType), projectCode = VALUES(projectCode), serviceTypeName = VALUES(serviceTypeName), customerProjectName = VALUES(customerProjectName), agentName = VALUES(agentName), lendCause = VALUES(lendCause), projectMoney = VALUES(projectMoney), afProjectMoney = VALUES(afProjectMoney), submitTime = VALUES(submitTime), predBidDate = VALUES(predBidDate), customInfo = VALUES(customInfo)

insert into pm_project_product_af_from_sms (id, projectCode, orderExecNumber, corporationCode, ssfrId, productCode, productfirstCode, productName, productfirstName, productsubCode, productSubModel, productSubName, num, borrowNum, price, purchaseDiscount, purchasePrice) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderExecNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ssfrId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productfirstCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productfirstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productsubCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSubModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSubName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.borrowNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.purchaseDiscount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.purchasePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = VALUES(id), projectCode = VALUES(projectCode), orderExecNumber = VALUES(orderExecNumber), corporationCode = VALUES(corporationCode), ssfrId = VALUES(ssfrId), productCode = VALUES(productCode), productfirstCode = VALUES(productfirstCode), productName = VALUES(productName), productfirstName = VALUES(productfirstName), productsubCode = VALUES(productsubCode), productSubModel = VALUES(productSubModel), productSubName = VALUES(productSubName), num = VALUES(num), borrowNum = VALUES(borrowNum), price = VALUES(price), purchaseDiscount = VALUES(purchaseDiscount), purchasePrice = VALUES(purchasePrice)

insert into pm_facilitator_form_d365 (`code`, `account`, `name`, `type`, `bankInfo`, `bankAccount`, `cnapsCode`, `contacts`, `tel`, `email`, `state`, `needApprove`, `approveStatus`, `deliveryIds`, `relateType`, `effectiveFrom`, `effectiveTo`, `createBy`, `createTime`, `updateBy`, `updateTime`, `customInfo`) values
(#{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cnapsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.needApprove,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.approveStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.deliveryIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.relateType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.customInfo,jdbcType=JSON})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code = VALUES(code), account = VALUES(account), name = VALUES(name), type = VALUES(type), bankInfo = VALUES(bankInfo), bankAccount = VALUES(bankAccount), cnapsCode = VALUES(cnapsCode), contacts = VALUES(contacts), tel = VALUES(tel), email = VALUES(email), state = VALUES(state), needApprove = VALUES(needApprove), approveStatus = VALUES(approveStatus), deliveryIds = VALUES(deliveryIds), relateType = VALUES(relateType), effectiveFrom = VALUES(effectiveFrom), effectiveTo = VALUES(effectiveTo), updateBy = VALUES(updateBy), updateTime = VALUES(updateTime) , customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), VALUES(customInfo))

INSERT INTO pm_project_property_af_from_sms SELECT * FROM pm_project_property_af_from_sms_history; INSERT INTO pm_project_product_af_from_sms SELECT * FROM pm_project_product_af_from_sms_history;
insert into pm_project_property_af_from_sms ( id, `orderExecNumber`, `projectCode`, `projectName`, `salesManCode`, `salesManName`, `marketCode`, `marketName`, `systemId`, `systemName`, `expendId`, `expendName`, `industryId`, `industryName`, `officeCode`, `officeName`, `serviceTypeName`, `channelName`, `engineeFee`, `objId`, `applyType`, `corporationCode`, `customerProjectName`, `finalCustomerName`, `agentName`, projectType, projectMoney, afProjectMoney, submitTime, predBidDate, dataSource ) select distinct ppfs.id, ppfs.`orderExecNumber`, ppfs.`projectCode`, `projectName`, `salesManCode`, `salesManName`, `marketCode`, `marketName`, `systemId`, `systemName`, `expendId`, `expendName`, `industryId`, `industryName`, `officeCode`, `officeName`, `serviceTypeName`, `channelName`, `engineeFee`, ifnull(`objId`, 0) as objId, `applyType`, ppfs.`corporationCode`, `customerProjectName`, `finalCustomerName`, `agentName`, "afss" as projectType, projectMoney, ROUND(SUM(ppfd.purchasePrice * ppfd.num), 2) as afProjectMoney, submitTime, predBidDate, ppfs.dataSource from `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs inner join `pm_project_product_af_from_sms` ppfd on ppfs.`orderExecNumber` = ppfd.`orderExecNumber` and ppfs.`projectCode` = ppfd.`projectCode`
FIND_IN_SET(ppfd.`productfirstCode`, #{productfirstCodes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ppfd.`productCode`, #{productCodes}) AND
(
ppfd.`productfirstCode` = #{group.productfirstCode} AND
ppfd.`productCode` = #{group.productCode} AND
FIND_IN_SET(ppfd.`productfirstCode`, #{group.productfirstCodes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ppfd.`productCode`, #{group.productCodes}) AND
)
AND
FIND_IN_SET(ppfs.`dataSource`, #{dataSources}) AND
group by ppfs.`id` ;

insert into sms_ofst_contract_head_sap (id, contract_num, batch_code, project_name, order_num, client_supplier_code, client_supplier_name, contract_money_amount, delivered_money_amount, collected_money_amount, collected_money_ratio, receivables_money_amount, over_due_money_amount, maketing_department_name, office_name, industry_name, marketing_representative_name, currency_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, effective_from, effective_to, import_batch_num, contract_create_date, projectCode, marketCode, systemId, industryId, officeCode, expendId, usernamec, latest_ship_date, usernamec2, systemid_o, expendid_o, industry_name_o ) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.contractNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.batchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.clientSupplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.clientSupplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contractMoneyAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.deliveredMoneyAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.collectedMoneyAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.collectedMoneyRatio,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.receivablesMoneyAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.overDueMoneyAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.maketingDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketingRepresentativeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.currencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.importBatchNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contractCreateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.projectcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.industryid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.officecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expendid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.usernamec,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.latestShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.usernamec2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemidO,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.expendidO,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.industryNameO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contract_num = VALUES(contract_num), batch_code = VALUES(batch_code), project_name = VALUES(project_name), order_num = VALUES(order_num), client_supplier_code = VALUES(client_supplier_code), client_supplier_name = VALUES(client_supplier_name), contract_money_amount = VALUES(contract_money_amount), delivered_money_amount = VALUES(delivered_money_amount), collected_money_amount = VALUES(collected_money_amount), collected_money_ratio = VALUES(collected_money_ratio), receivables_money_amount = VALUES(receivables_money_amount), over_due_money_amount = VALUES(over_due_money_amount), maketing_department_name = VALUES(maketing_department_name), office_name = VALUES(office_name), industry_name = VALUES(industry_name), marketing_representative_name = VALUES(marketing_representative_name), currency_name = VALUES(currency_name), create_by = VALUES(create_by), create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time), effective_from = VALUES(effective_from), effective_to = VALUES(effective_to), import_batch_num = VALUES(import_batch_num), contract_create_date = VALUES(contract_create_date), projectCode = VALUES(projectCode), marketCode = VALUES(marketCode), systemId = VALUES(systemId), industryId = VALUES(industryId), officeCode = VALUES(officeCode), expendId = VALUES(expendId), usernamec = VALUES(usernamec), latest_ship_date = VALUES(latest_ship_date), usernamec2 = VALUES(usernamec2), systemid_o = VALUES(systemid_o), expendid_o = VALUES(expendid_o), industry_name_o = VALUES(industry_name_o)

insert into pm_dispatch_project_settlement_from_d365 ( `slipId`, `inventTransId`, `vendAccount`, `innerInvoiceId`, `invoiceDate`, `invoiceId`, `purchId`, `purchName`, `purchPoolId`, `packingSlipId`, `packingSlipRemark`, `slipQty`, `receiveQty`, `invoiceQty`, `price`, `invoicePrice`, `receiveAmount`, `invoiceAmount`, `settleQty`, `lineAmount`, `invoiceAmountTotal`, `settleAmountTotal`, `settleAmount`, `confirmTime`, `settleTime`, `projectProgress`, `otherSysNum`, `partition`, `dataAreaId`, `settleId`) values
(#{item.slipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.inventTransId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vendAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.innerInvoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invoiceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.invoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.purchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.purchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.purchPoolId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.packingSlipId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.packingSlipRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.slipQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.receiveQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.invoiceQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.invoicePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.receiveAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.invoiceAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.settleQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lineAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.invoiceAmountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.settleAmountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.settleAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.settleTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.projectProgress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.otherSysNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.partition,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.dataAreaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.settleId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE inventTransId = VALUES(inventTransId), innerInvoiceId = VALUES(innerInvoiceId), invoiceDate = VALUES(invoiceDate), invoiceId = VALUES(invoiceId), purchId = VALUES(purchId), vendAccount = VALUES(vendAccount), purchName = VALUES(purchName), purchPoolId = VALUES(purchPoolId), packingSlipId = VALUES(packingSlipId), packingSlipRemark = VALUES(packingSlipRemark), slipQty = VALUES(slipQty), receiveQty = VALUES(receiveQty), invoiceQty = VALUES(invoiceQty), price = VALUES(price), invoicePrice = VALUES(invoicePrice), receiveAmount = VALUES(receiveAmount), invoiceAmount = VALUES(invoiceAmount), settleQty = VALUES(settleQty), lineAmount = VALUES(lineAmount), invoiceAmountTotal = VALUES(invoiceAmountTotal), settleAmountTotal = VALUES(settleAmountTotal), settleAmount = VALUES(settleAmount), confirmTime = VALUES(confirmTime), settleTime = VALUES(settleTime), projectProgress = VALUES(projectProgress), otherSysNum = VALUES(otherSysNum), `partition` = VALUES(`partition`), dataAreaId = VALUES(dataAreaId), settleId = VALUES(settleId)
mapper.sql: REPLACE(CONCAT('{"paidAmount":"', ROUND(IFNULL(dps.settleAmount, 0), 2), '"', ', "paid":', dps.settleId IS NOT NULL AND dps.settleAmount = dps.lineAmount, ', "paidState":"', IF(dps.settleAmount = dps.lineAmount, '已付款', IF(dps.invoiceAmount = 0, '待开票', IF(dps.slipId IS NOT NULL, '待付款', ''))), '"', ', "paystate":"', IF(dps.settleAmount = dps.lineAmount, '已付款', IF(dps.invoiceAmount = 0, '待开票', IF(dps.slipId IS NOT NULL, '待付款', ''))), '"', ', "invoiceId":"', IFNULL(dps.`invoiceId`, ''), '"', ', "innerInvoiceId":"', IFNULL(dps.`innerInvoiceId`, ''), '"', ', "invoiceDate":"', IFNULL(dps.`invoiceDate`, ''), '"', ', "invoiceAmount":"', IFNULL(dps.`invoiceAmount`, ''), '"', ', "relateSource": "D365"', '}'), '\\', '\\\\')
mapper.update:
UPDATE pm_dispatch_project_settlement_from_d365 dps LEFT JOIN `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds ON dps.`packingSlipId` = ds.`customInfo` ->> '$.packingSlipId' LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` sp ON dps.`packingSlipId` = sp.`customInfo` ->> '$.packingSlipId' SET ds.paymentTime = DATE_ADD(dps.`settleTime`, INTERVAL 8 HOUR) , ds.sseId = dps.slipId , ds.settled = dps.settleId IS NOT NULL AND dps.settleAmount = dps.lineAmount , ds.customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(ds.customInfo, "{}"), )
, sp.paymentTime = DATE_ADD(dps.`settleTime`, INTERVAL 8 HOUR) , sp.sseId = dps.slipId , sp.customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(sp.customInfo, "{}"), ) WHERE (ds.id IS NOT NULL AND 0 = IFNULL(ds.`customInfo` ->> '$.paid', 0)) OR (sp.id IS NOT NULL AND 0 = IFNULL(sp.`customInfo` ->> '$.paid', 0));

UPDATE `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds INNER JOIN pm_dispatch_project_settlement_from_d365 dps ON dps.`packingSlipId` = ds.`customInfo` ->> '$.packingSlipId' SET ds.paymentTime = DATE_ADD(dps.`settleTime`, INTERVAL 8 HOUR) , ds.sseId = dps.slipId , ds.settled = dps.settleId IS NOT NULL AND dps.settleAmount = dps.lineAmount , ds.customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(ds.customInfo, "{}"), ) WHERE (ds.id IS NOT NULL AND 0 = IFNULL(ds.`customInfo` ->> '$.paid', 0));
UPDATE `pm_subcontract_project_payment` sp INNER JOIN pm_dispatch_project_settlement_from_d365 dps ON dps.`packingSlipId` = sp.`customInfo` ->> '$.packingSlipId' SET sp.paymentTime = DATE_ADD(dps.`settleTime`, INTERVAL 8 HOUR) , sp.sseId = dps.slipId , sp.customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(sp.customInfo, "{}"), ) WHERE (sp.id IS NOT NULL AND 0 = IFNULL(sp.`customInfo` ->> '$.paid', 0));
